title: How Chalet Market Grew Organic Traffic 105% with Weekly Content
excerpt: How a Montana gourmet food retailer on Shopify grew organic traffic 105% in six months with weekly human-written content.
challenge:
Chalet Market is a family-owned business offering premium Montana meats, specialty foods, and gourmet items through their Shopify store.

Despite having exceptional products, their online traffic had stagnated. Their small team didn't have the time or resources to consistently create the content needed to improve search visibility and attract new customers.

Key challenges:
- Stagnant organic traffic
- Limited time for content creation
- Inconsistent publishing schedule
- Low search engine visibility
approach:
Starting in March 2024, our team built a customized content strategy informed by keyword research and audience insights. Real human writers produced weekly blog content tailored to Chalet Market's brand voice, Montana heritage, and gourmet product lines.

Five content types shipped on a weekly cadence:
- Product Spotlights: featured premium meats and specialty items with internal links and CTAs
- Brand Storytelling: connected Montana heritage and family values to product offerings
- Recipe Content: inspiring recipes using Chalet Market products
- Educational Articles: answered common customer questions about products and preparation
- Community Features: highlighted local Montana partnerships and suppliers

Every piece was optimized for search with strategic keyword placement, meta descriptions, internal linking, and structured formatting to maximize visibility.
results: Within six months, organic traffic to the Chalet Market Shopify store grew 105%. Holiday-level impressions arrived six months ahead of schedule. Customers spent more time browsing product pages, blog engagement quadrupled, and brand awareness deepened in their target market.
quote: Their content strategy has made a tangible difference in our online presence. We are seeing increased traffic to our website and Shopify store, and customers are engaging with our brand on a deeper level.
aeo_summary: Chalet Market is a family-owned Montana gourmet food retailer on Shopify. We built a weekly content engine of blog posts, product spotlights, brand storytelling, and recipe content, with on-page SEO across every piece. Organic traffic grew 105% in six months, blog engagement quadrupled, and holiday-level impressions arrived a half-year early.
